---
title: "Research"
---

My research primarily focuses on the following topics: local public service delivery, local and social network analysis. Below are brief introductions to these topics and the projects 

Local service delivery, Urban shrinkage, 

LOcal autonomy

I am currently involved in:

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title A Gantt Diagram
    dateFormat MM-DD-YYYY
    section Section
        A task          :a1, 03-03-2024, 30d
        Another task    :after a1, 20d
    section Another
        Task in Another :03-03-2024, 12d
        another task    :24d

```
